description.en_US: Integrate Google Calendar into Atomemo workflows
description.zh_Hans: 将 Google 日历集成到 Atomemo 工作流中

description.en_US: OAuth2 for Google Calendar API. Enter Client ID and Client Secret from Google Cloud Console, then authorize via the OAuth flow to connect your calendar.
description.zh_Hans: Google Calendar API 的 OAuth2 凭证。在 Google Cloud Console 填入 Client ID 和 Client Secret，然后通过 OAuth 授权流程连接你的日历。

hint.en_US: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from Google Cloud Console
hint.zh_Hans: 来自 Google Cloud Console 的 OAuth 2.0 客户端 ID

hint.en_US: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret from Google Cloud Console
hint.zh_Hans: 来自 Google Cloud Console 的 OAuth 2.0 客户端密钥

description.en_US: Get calendar metadata by ID
description.zh_Hans: 根据 ID 获取日历元数据

llm_description.en_US: Calendar identifier. Use the keyword "primary" to access the currently authenticated user's primary calendar. For other calendars, use the calendar ID which is typically an email address — either the owner's email (e.g. user@gmail.com) or the calendar-specific address (e.g. abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com). Call calendarList.list (the "List Calendars" tool) to retrieve all available calendar IDs.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 日历标识符。使用关键字 "primary" 访问当前登录用户的主日历。其他日历使用日历 ID，通常为邮箱地址格式——可以是所有者邮箱（如 user@gmail.com）或日历专属地址（如 abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com）。调用「列出日历」工具可获取所有可用的日历 ID。

hint.en_US: Use "primary" for your main calendar, or a calendar email address. Run "List Calendars" to find IDs.
hint.zh_Hans: 主日历使用 "primary"，或使用日历邮箱地址。可通过「列出日历」获取所有日历 ID。

description.en_US: Create a new calendar
description.zh_Hans: 创建新的日历

llm_description.en_US: Title of the calendar.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 日历标题。

hint.en_US: Calendar name/title
hint.zh_Hans: 日历名称

llm_description.en_US: Description of the calendar.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 日历描述。

hint.en_US: Calendar description
hint.zh_Hans: 日历描述

llm_description.en_US: Geographic location of the calendar as free-form text.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 日历的地理位置，自由格式文本。

hint.en_US: Geographic location of the calendar
hint.zh_Hans: 日历的地理位置

llm_description.en_US: Default IANA timezone for the calendar. Examples: "Asia/Shanghai", "America/New_York", "Europe/Berlin", "Etc/UTC".
llm_description.zh_Hans: 日历默认 IANA 时区。示例："Asia/Shanghai"、"America/New_York"、"Europe/Berlin"、"Etc/UTC"。

hint.en_US: Default timezone in IANA format. Examples: Asia/Shanghai, America/Los_Angeles, Europe/London, Etc/UTC
hint.zh_Hans: 默认时区，IANA 格式。示例：Asia/Shanghai、America/Los_Angeles、Europe/London、Etc/UTC

description.en_US: Update calendar metadata
description.zh_Hans: 更新日历元数据

llm_description.en_US: Secondary calendar identifier. Must be a calendar email address (e.g. abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com). Do NOT use "primary" — this operation cannot target the primary calendar. Call "List Calendars" to find available IDs.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 次要日历标识符。必须为日历邮箱地址（如 abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com）。不能使用 "primary"——此操作不能用于主日历。调用「列出日历」获取可用 ID。

hint.en_US: calendar ID (email address). Run "List Calendars" to find IDs.
hint.zh_Hans: 日历 ID（邮箱地址格式）。可通过「列出日历」获取 ID。

llm_description.en_US: New title of the calendar. Leave empty to keep unchanged.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 新的日历标题。留空则不修改。

hint.en_US: Calendar name/title
hint.zh_Hans: 日历名称

llm_description.en_US: New description of the calendar.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 新的日历描述。

hint.en_US: Calendar description
hint.zh_Hans: 日历描述

llm_description.en_US: New geographic location as free-form text.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 新的地理位置，自由格式文本。

hint.en_US: Geographic location of the calendar
hint.zh_Hans: 日历的地理位置

llm_description.en_US: New IANA timezone. Examples: "Asia/Shanghai", "America/New_York", "Europe/Berlin", "Etc/UTC".
llm_description.zh_Hans: 新的 IANA 时区。示例："Asia/Shanghai"、"America/New_York"、"Europe/Berlin"、"Etc/UTC"。

hint.en_US: Default timezone in IANA format. Examples: Asia/Shanghai, America/Los_Angeles, Europe/London, Etc/UTC
hint.zh_Hans: 默认时区，IANA 格式。示例：Asia/Shanghai、America/Los_Angeles、Europe/London、Etc/UTC

description.en_US: Delete a calendar
description.zh_Hans: 删除日历

llm_description.en_US: Calendar ID (e.g. abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com). Use the List Calendars tool to discover IDs.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 日历 ID（如 abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com）。通过「列出日历」查找。

hint.en_US: Calendar ID (e.g. abcdef@group.calendar.google.com). Run List Calendars to find IDs.
hint.zh_Hans: 日历 ID（如 abcdef@group.calendar.google.com）。可通过「列出日历」获取 ID。

description.en_US: DANGEROUS: Permanently delete ALL events from the primary calendar. This operation only works on the primary calendar and cannot be undone.
description.zh_Hans: 危险操作：永久删除主日历中的所有事件。此操作仅适用于主日历，且不可撤销。

llm_description.en_US: Only "primary" is allowed. This dangerous operation clears ALL events from the primary calendar and CANNOT be undone.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 仅允许 "primary"。此危险操作将永久删除主日历中的所有事件，且不可撤销。

hint.en_US: ⚠️ Only works on primary calendar. This will permanently delete ALL events!
hint.zh_Hans: ⚠️ 仅适用于主日历。将永久删除所有事件！

description.en_US: List calendars in the user's calendar list
description.zh_Hans: 列出用户日历列表中的日历

description.en_US: Get a single calendar from the user's calendar list
description.zh_Hans: 从用户日历列表中获取单个日历

llm_description.en_US: Calendar identifier. Use the keyword "primary" to access the currently authenticated user's primary calendar. For other calendars, use the calendar ID which is typically an email address — either the owner's email (e.g. user@gmail.com) or the calendar-specific address (e.g. abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com). Call calendarList.list (the "List Calendars" tool) to retrieve all available calendar IDs.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 日历标识符。使用关键字 "primary" 访问当前登录用户的主日历。其他日历使用日历 ID，通常为邮箱地址格式——可以是所有者邮箱（如 user@gmail.com）或日历专属地址（如 abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com）。调用「列出日历」工具可获取所有可用的日历 ID。

hint.en_US: Use "primary" for your main calendar, or a calendar email address. Run "List Calendars" to find IDs.
hint.zh_Hans: 主日历使用 "primary"，或使用日历邮箱地址。可通过「列出日历」获取所有日历 ID。

description.en_US: Add an existing calendar to the user's calendar list
description.zh_Hans: 将现有日历添加到用户日历列表

llm_description.en_US: Calendar ID (e.g. abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com). Use the List Calendars tool to discover IDs.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 日历 ID（如 abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com）。通过「列出日历」查找。

hint.en_US: Calendar ID (e.g. abcdef@group.calendar.google.com). Run List Calendars to find IDs.
hint.zh_Hans: 日历 ID（如 abcdef@group.calendar.google.com）。可通过「列出日历」获取 ID。

hint.en_US: Whether to show this calendar in the UI
hint.zh_Hans: 是否在界面中显示此日历

llm_description.en_US: Calendar color ID (1-24) referencing the calendar section of the colors definition.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 日历颜色 ID（1-24），引用颜色定义中的日历部分。

hint.en_US: Predefined color ID (1-11 for calendar)
hint.zh_Hans: 预定义颜色 ID（1-11）

description.en_US: Update user-specific calendar list properties
description.zh_Hans: 更新用户特定的日历列表属性

llm_description.en_US: Secondary calendar identifier. Must be a calendar email address (e.g. abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com). Do NOT use "primary" — this operation cannot target the primary calendar. Call "List Calendars" to find available IDs.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 次要日历标识符。必须为日历邮箱地址（如 abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com）。不能使用 "primary"——此操作不能用于主日历。调用「列出日历」获取可用 ID。

hint.en_US: calendar ID (email address). Run "List Calendars" to find IDs.
hint.zh_Hans: 日历 ID（邮箱地址格式）。可通过「列出日历」获取 ID。

hint.en_US: Calendar name/title
hint.zh_Hans: 日历名称

llm_description.en_US: Calendar color ID (1-24) referencing the calendar section of the colors definition. Use 'Get Colors' to see available options.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 日历颜色 ID（1-24），引用颜色定义中的日历部分。使用「获取颜色」工具查看可用选项。

hint.en_US: Predefined color ID (1-11 for calendar)
hint.zh_Hans: 预定义颜色 ID（1-11）

hint.en_US: Whether to show this calendar in the UI
hint.zh_Hans: 是否在界面中显示此日历

description.en_US: Remove a calendar from the user's calendar list
description.zh_Hans: 从用户日历列表中移除日历

llm_description.en_US: Secondary calendar identifier. Must be a calendar email address (e.g. abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com). Do NOT use "primary" — this operation cannot target the primary calendar. Call "List Calendars" to find available IDs.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 次要日历标识符。必须为日历邮箱地址（如 abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com）。不能使用 "primary"——此操作不能用于主日历。调用「列出日历」获取可用 ID。

hint.en_US: calendar ID (email address). Run "List Calendars" to find IDs.
hint.zh_Hans: 日历 ID（邮箱地址格式）。可通过「列出日历」获取 ID。

description.en_US: List events via Calendar API v3 events.list (see Google documentation for query parameters).
description.zh_Hans: 通过 Calendar API v3 的 events.list 列出事件（参数与官方文档一致）。

llm_description.en_US: Calendar identifier. Use the keyword "primary" to access the currently authenticated user's primary calendar. For other calendars, use the calendar ID which is typically an email address — either the owner's email (e.g. user@gmail.com) or the calendar-specific address (e.g. abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com). Call calendarList.list (the "List Calendars" tool) to retrieve all available calendar IDs.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 日历标识符。使用关键字 "primary" 访问当前登录用户的主日历。其他日历使用日历 ID，通常为邮箱地址格式——可以是所有者邮箱（如 user@gmail.com）或日历专属地址（如 abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com）。调用「列出日历」工具可获取所有可用的日历 ID。

hint.en_US: Use "primary" for your main calendar, or a calendar email address. Run "List Calendars" to find IDs.
hint.zh_Hans: 主日历使用 "primary"，或使用日历邮箱地址。可通过「列出日历」获取所有日历 ID。

llm_description.en_US: maxResults: max events per page (default 250, max 2500). See nextPageToken for pagination.
llm_description.zh_Hans: maxResults：单页最大事件数（默认 250，最大 2500）。分页使用响应中的 nextPageToken。

hint.en_US: maxResults: events per page, default 250, maximum 2500 (Google Calendar API).
hint.zh_Hans: maxResults：每页事件数，默认 250，最大 2500（Google Calendar API）。

llm_description.en_US: pageToken from a previous response’s nextPageToken to fetch the next page.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 上一页响应中 nextPageToken 的值，用于请求下一页。

hint.en_US: pageToken from nextPageToken to fetch the next page.
hint.zh_Hans: 使用上一页响应中的 nextPageToken 作为 pageToken 获取下一页。

llm_description.en_US: syncToken from a prior list response’s nextSyncToken for incremental sync. Cannot be combined with time_min, time_max, updated_min, q, i_cal_uid, order_by, or extended-property filters.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 增量同步：使用上次列表结果最后一页的 nextSyncToken。不可与 time_min、time_max、updated_min、q、i_cal_uid、order_by 及扩展属性筛选同时使用。

hint.en_US: syncToken from nextSyncToken for incremental sync; cannot mix with time filters, q, iCalUID, orderBy, or extended properties.
hint.zh_Hans: 使用上次列表结果中的 nextSyncToken 做增量同步；不可与时间筛选、q、iCalUID、orderBy、扩展属性同时使用。

llm_description.en_US: timeMin: lower bound (exclusive) for an event’s end time. RFC3339 with offset. Examples: 2025-03-01T00:00:00Z, 2025-03-01T08:00:00+08:00.

hint.en_US: timeMin (optional): RFC3339 with timezone offset; lower bound (exclusive) for event end time. Examples: 2025-03-01T00:00:00Z, 2025-03-01T08:00:00+08:00.

llm_description.en_US: timeMax: upper bound (exclusive) for an event’s start time. RFC3339; must be > timeMin if both set. Examples: 2025-03-31T23:59:59Z, 2025-04-01T00:00:00+08:00.
llm_description.zh_Hans: timeMax：事件开始时间的上限（不含）。RFC3339；与 timeMin 同时设置时必须更晚。示例：2025-03-31T23:59:59Z、2025-04-01T00:00:00+08:00。

hint.en_US: timeMax (optional): RFC3339 with timezone offset; upper bound (exclusive) for event start time; must be after timeMin if both set. Examples: 2025-03-31T23:59:59Z, 2025-04-01T00:00:00+08:00.
hint.zh_Hans: timeMax（可选）：RFC3339 含时区偏移；事件开始时间的上限（不含）；须晚于 timeMin。示例：2025-03-31T23:59:59Z、2025-04-01T00:00:00+08:00。

llm_description.en_US: timeZone: IANA id for times in the response (default: calendar’s zone). Examples: Asia/Shanghai, Europe/Berlin, Etc/UTC.
llm_description.zh_Hans: timeZone：响应时间的 IANA 时区（默认取日历时区）。示例：Asia/Shanghai、Europe/Berlin、Etc/UTC。

hint.en_US: timeZone used in the API response (default: calendar timezone). Examples: Asia/Shanghai, Europe/Berlin, America/New_York, Etc/UTC.
hint.zh_Hans: timeZone：响应中使用的时区（默认取日历时区）。示例：Asia/Shanghai、Europe/Berlin、America/New_York、Etc/UTC。

llm_description.en_US: q: free-text search over summary, description, location, attendees, organizer, working-location fields, etc.
llm_description.zh_Hans: q：自由文本搜索，匹配标题、描述、地点、参与者、组织者、工作地点相关字段等。

hint.en_US: q: free-text search (summary, description, location, attendees, organizer, working location fields, etc.).
hint.zh_Hans: q：自由文本搜索（标题、描述、地点、参与者、组织者、工作地点相关字段等）。

llm_description.en_US: iCalUID: filter by iCalendar event UID.
llm_description.zh_Hans: iCalUID：按 iCalendar 活动 ID 筛选。

hint.en_US: Filter by iCalendar UID.
hint.zh_Hans: 按 iCalendar UID 筛选。

llm_description.en_US: singleEvents: if true, expand recurring events into instances (API default is false). Required for orderBy=startTime.
llm_description.zh_Hans: singleEvents：为 true 时展开重复事件为实例（API 默认为 false）。orderBy=startTime 时必须为 true。

hint.en_US: singleEvents: expand recurring into instances (API default false). Must be true for orderBy=startTime.
hint.zh_Hans: singleEvents：为 true 时展开重复事件为实例（API 默认为 false）。orderBy=startTime 时必须为 true。

llm_description.en_US: orderBy: startTime (ascending; only when singleEvents=true) or updated (ascending by last modification). Omit for API default stable order.
llm_description.zh_Hans: orderBy：startTime（升序，仅当 singleEvents=true）或 updated（按最后修改时间升序）。不填则使用 API 默认稳定顺序。

hint.en_US: Result order. 'startTime' requires singleEvents=true.
hint.zh_Hans: 结果排序方式，'startTime' 需要展开重复事件

llm_description.en_US: eventTypes: comma-separated event types — birthday, default, focusTime, fromGmail, outOfOffice, workingLocation.
llm_description.zh_Hans: eventTypes：逗号分隔，可选值：birthday、default、focusTime、fromGmail、outOfOffice、workingLocation。

hint.en_US: eventTypes: comma-separated — birthday, default, focusTime, fromGmail, outOfOffice, workingLocation.
hint.zh_Hans: eventTypes：逗号分隔，如 birthday、default、focusTime、fromGmail、outOfOffice、workingLocation。

llm_description.en_US: privateExtendedProperty: comma-separated constraints as propertyName=value (matches private extended properties only).
llm_description.zh_Hans: privateExtendedProperty：逗号分隔的 propertyName=value，仅匹配私有扩展属性。

hint.en_US: privateExtendedProperty: comma-separated propertyName=value pairs.
hint.zh_Hans: privateExtendedProperty：逗号分隔的 propertyName=value。

llm_description.en_US: sharedExtendedProperty: comma-separated propertyName=value (shared extended properties only).
llm_description.zh_Hans: sharedExtendedProperty：逗号分隔的 propertyName=value，仅匹配共享扩展属性。

hint.en_US: sharedExtendedProperty: comma-separated propertyName=value pairs.
hint.zh_Hans: sharedExtendedProperty：逗号分隔的 propertyName=value。

llm_description.en_US: showDeleted: include cancelled events (status "cancelled"). Default false.
llm_description.zh_Hans: showDeleted：是否包含已取消事件（status 为 "cancelled"）。默认 false。

hint.en_US: Include cancelled/deleted events in results
hint.zh_Hans: 在结果中包含已取消/已删除的事件

llm_description.en_US: showHiddenInvitations: include hidden invitations. Default false.
llm_description.zh_Hans: showHiddenInvitations：是否包含隐藏邀请。默认 false。

hint.en_US: Include hidden invitations.
hint.zh_Hans: 包含隐藏邀请。

llm_description.en_US: updatedMin: RFC3339 lower bound on last modification time; deletes since then are always included. Examples: 2025-03-01T00:00:00Z, 2025-03-01T09:00:00+09:00.
llm_description.zh_Hans: updatedMin：最后修改时间的 RFC3339 下限；此后删除的条目始终包含。示例：2025-03-01T00:00:00Z、2025-03-01T09:00:00+09:00。

hint.en_US: RFC3339 lower bound on last modification time. Examples: 2025-03-01T00:00:00Z, 2025-03-01T09:00:00+09:00.

llm_description.en_US: maxAttendees: max attendees per event in the response; if exceeded, only the participant may be returned.
llm_description.zh_Hans: maxAttendees：每个事件在响应中最多返回的参与者数；超过时可能仅返回参与者。

hint.en_US: Truncate attendees per event in the list response.
hint.zh_Hans: 列表中每个事件返回的参与者数量上限。

llm_description.en_US: fields: partial response mask (Google Common Parameters), e.g. items(id,summary,start) or *.
llm_description.zh_Hans: fields：部分响应字段掩码（Google 通用参数），例如 items(id,summary,start) 或 *。

hint.en_US: Partial response field mask, e.g. items(id,summary) or *.
hint.zh_Hans: 部分响应字段掩码，如 items(id,summary) 或 *。

description.en_US: Create a new event on Google Calendar
description.zh_Hans: 在 Google 日历上创建新事件

llm_description.en_US: Calendar identifier. Use the keyword "primary" to access the currently authenticated user's primary calendar. For other calendars, use the calendar ID which is typically an email address — either the owner's email (e.g. user@gmail.com) or the calendar-specific address (e.g. abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com). Call calendarList.list (the "List Calendars" tool) to retrieve all available calendar IDs.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 日历标识符。使用关键字 "primary" 访问当前登录用户的主日历。其他日历使用日历 ID，通常为邮箱地址格式——可以是所有者邮箱（如 user@gmail.com）或日历专属地址（如 abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com）。调用「列出日历」工具可获取所有可用的日历 ID。

hint.en_US: Use "primary" for your main calendar, or a calendar email address. Run "List Calendars" to find IDs.
hint.zh_Hans: 主日历使用 "primary"，或使用日历邮箱地址。可通过「列出日历」获取所有日历 ID。

llm_description.en_US: Title of the event.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 事件标题。

hint.en_US: Event title/summary
hint.zh_Hans: 事件标题

hint.en_US: If enabled, use date only (no time)
hint.zh_Hans: 启用时仅使用日期（不含时间）

llm_description.en_US: Start time in RFC3339 format. A timezone offset is required unless timezone is specified, e.g. 2025-03-18T09:00:00+08:00 or 2025-03-18T01:00:00Z.
Exclusive end in RFC3339; must be after start. Examples: 2025-03-18T10:00:00+08:00, 2025-03-18T02:00:00Z.

hint.en_US: RFC3339 datetime with timezone offset, must be after start time. Examples: 2025-03-18T10:00:00+08:00, 2025-03-18T02:00:00Z

llm_description.en_US: All-day start date (yyyy-mm-dd). Examples: 2025-03-18, 2025-12-01.

hint.en_US: Start date for all-day events, format: yyyy-mm-dd. Example: 2025-03-18
hint.zh_Hans: 全天事件开始日期，格式：yyyy-mm-dd。示例：2025-03-18

llm_description.en_US: Exclusive end date (yyyy-mm-dd); for one-day event use the day after start_date. Examples: range Mar 18 only → end 2025-03-19.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 全天结束日期（不含）；单日事件填开始日的下一天。示例：仅 3/18 一天 → 结束 2025-03-19。

hint.en_US: End date (exclusive) for all-day events, must be after start date. For a single day, set to the next day. Example: one-day event on Mar 18 → end_date = 2025-03-19
hint.zh_Hans: 全天事件结束日期（不含），必须晚于开始日期。单日事件需设为开始日期的下一天。示例：3月18日一天的事件 → 结束日期 = 2025-03-19

llm_description.en_US: IANA Time Zone Database name for timed events. Examples: "Asia/Shanghai", "America/New_York", "Europe/Berlin", "Etc/UTC".
llm_description.zh_Hans: IANA 时区名称（用于非全天事件的开始/结束）。示例："Asia/Shanghai"、"America/New_York"、"Europe/Berlin"、"Etc/UTC"。

hint.en_US: IANA timezone name. Examples: Asia/Shanghai, America/Los_Angeles, Europe/London, Asia/Tokyo, Etc/UTC
hint.zh_Hans: IANA 时区名称。示例：Asia/Shanghai、America/Los_Angeles、Europe/London、Asia/Tokyo、Etc/UTC

llm_description.en_US: Whether to send notifications. "all" = all guests, "externalOnly" = non-Google Calendar guests only, "none" = no notifications.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 是否发送通知。"all" = 所有参与者，"externalOnly" = 仅非 Google 日历参与者，"none" = 不通知。

hint.en_US: Whether to send notifications about the event change
hint.zh_Hans: 是否发送关于事件变更的通知

hint.zh_Hans: 添加描述和地点

hint.en_US: Event description
hint.zh_Hans: 事件描述

llm_description.en_US: Geographic location of the event as free-form text.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 事件地理位置，自由格式文本。

hint.en_US: Event location (address or place name)
hint.zh_Hans: 事件地点（地址或场所名称）

hint.en_US: Show additional event options: visibility, show-as, status, color, recurrence, attendees, guest permissions, and max attendees
hint.zh_Hans: 显示更多事件选项：可见性、显示为、状态、颜色、重复规则、参与者、来宾权限与最大参与者数

llm_description.en_US: Event visibility. "default" = calendar default, "public" = visible to all, "private" = only attendees, "confidential" = same as private (compatibility).
llm_description.zh_Hans: 事件可见性。"default" = 日历默认, "public" = 对所有人可见, "private" = 仅参与者可见, "confidential" = 同 private（兼容性）。

hint.en_US: Visibility of the event
hint.zh_Hans: 事件的可见性

llm_description.en_US: Whether the event blocks time on the calendar. "opaque" = busy (default), "transparent" = available.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 事件是否在日历上占用时间。"opaque" = 忙碌（默认），"transparent" = 有空。

hint.en_US: Whether the event blocks time on the calendar
hint.zh_Hans: 事件是否在日历上占用时间

llm_description.en_US: Status of the event. "confirmed" = default, "tentative" = tentatively confirmed.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 事件状态。"confirmed" = 已确认（默认），"tentative" = 暂定。

hint.en_US: Status of the event
hint.zh_Hans: 事件状态

llm_description.en_US: Event color ID (1-11) referencing the event colors definition. Use the 'Get Colors' tool to see available options.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 事件颜色 ID（1-11），引用事件颜色定义。使用「获取颜色」工具查看可用选项。

hint.en_US: Color ID from colors endpoint (1-11). Use 'Get Colors' to see options.
hint.zh_Hans: 颜色端点中的颜色 ID（1-11），使用「获取颜色」查看选项

llm_description.en_US: Recurrence rule per RFC5545. Examples: RRULE:FREQ=DAILY;COUNT=5, RRULE:FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=MO,WE,FR, RRULE:FREQ=MONTHLY;BYMONTHDAY=15.
llm_description.zh_Hans: RFC5545 重复规则。例如：RRULE:FREQ=DAILY;COUNT=5, RRULE:FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=MO,WE,FR, RRULE:FREQ=MONTHLY;BYMONTHDAY=15。

hint.en_US: RRULE per RFC5545. Examples: RRULE:FREQ=DAILY;COUNT=5 — RRULE:FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=MO,WE,FR — RRULE:FREQ=MONTHLY;BYMONTHDAY=15
hint.zh_Hans: RFC5545 RRULE。示例：RRULE:FREQ=DAILY;COUNT=5 — RRULE:FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=MO,WE,FR — RRULE:FREQ=MONTHLY;BYMONTHDAY=15

llm_description.en_US: Comma-separated email addresses of attendees. Each must be a valid email per RFC5322.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 参与者邮箱地址，逗号分隔。每个地址必须符合 RFC5322 邮箱格式。

hint.en_US: Comma-separated email addresses of attendees
hint.zh_Hans: 参与者邮箱地址，逗号分隔

llm_description.en_US: Whether attendees other than the organizer can invite others.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 是否允许非组织者的参与者邀请他人。

hint.en_US: Non-organizer attendees may invite others.
hint.zh_Hans: 非组织者参与者是否可邀请他人。

llm_description.en_US: Whether attendees other than the organizer can modify the event.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 是否允许非组织者的参与者修改事件。

hint.en_US: Non-organizer attendees may edit the event.
hint.zh_Hans: 非组织者参与者是否可编辑事件。

display_name.zh_Hans: 参与者可见其他参与者

llm_description.en_US: Whether attendees can see other guests on the event.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 参与者是否可见其他参与者。

hint.en_US: Attendees can see the guest list.
hint.zh_Hans: 参与者是否可见来宾列表。

llm_description.en_US: Max attendees to include in the API response for create/update. Omit for no cap.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 创建/更新时 API 响应中包含的最大参与者数。不填表示不限制。

hint.en_US: Cap attendees returned by create/update API.
hint.zh_Hans: 创建/更新接口返回的参与者数量上限。

description.en_US: Get a single event by ID
description.zh_Hans: 根据 ID 获取单个事件

llm_description.en_US: Calendar identifier. Use the keyword "primary" to access the currently authenticated user's primary calendar. For other calendars, use the calendar ID which is typically an email address — either the owner's email (e.g. user@gmail.com) or the calendar-specific address (e.g. abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com). Call calendarList.list (the "List Calendars" tool) to retrieve all available calendar IDs.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 日历标识符。使用关键字 "primary" 访问当前登录用户的主日历。其他日历使用日历 ID，通常为邮箱地址格式——可以是所有者邮箱（如 user@gmail.com）或日历专属地址（如 abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com）。调用「列出日历」工具可获取所有可用的日历 ID。

hint.en_US: Use "primary" for your main calendar, or a calendar email address. Run "List Calendars" to find IDs.
hint.zh_Hans: 主日历使用 "primary"，或使用日历邮箱地址。可通过「列出日历」获取所有日历 ID。

llm_description.en_US: Opaque event identifier. Must be 5-1024 characters, using base32hex characters (lowercase a-v and digits 0-9).
llm_description.zh_Hans: 事件标识符。必须为 5-1024 个字符，使用 base32hex 字符（小写字母 a-v 和数字 0-9）。

hint.en_US: The unique identifier of the event
hint.zh_Hans: 事件的唯一标识符

llm_description.en_US: Cap attendees in the response (n8n Get → Options → Max Attendees).
llm_description.zh_Hans: 限制响应中的参与者数量。

hint.en_US: Cap attendees in get response.
hint.zh_Hans: 获取事件响应中的参与者数量上限。

llm_description.en_US: timeZone (IANA) for times in the response. Examples: Asia/Shanghai, Europe/Berlin, Etc/UTC.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 响应中时间的 IANA 时区。示例：Asia/Shanghai、Europe/Berlin、Etc/UTC。

hint.en_US: IANA timezone for returned times. Examples: Asia/Shanghai, Europe/Berlin, Etc/UTC.
hint.zh_Hans: 返回时间的 IANA 时区。示例：Asia/Shanghai、Europe/Berlin、Etc/UTC。

description.en_US: Update an existing event
description.zh_Hans: 更新现有事件

llm_description.en_US: Calendar identifier. Use the keyword "primary" to access the currently authenticated user's primary calendar. hint.zh_Hans: 主日历使用 "primary"，或使用日历邮箱地址。可通过「列出日历」获取所有日历 ID。

hint.zh_Hans: 事件的唯一标识符

hint.en_US: If enabled, use date only (no time)
hint.zh_Hans: 启用时仅使用日期（不含时间）

llm_description.en_US: Start time in RFC3339 format. A timezone offset is required unless timezone is specified, e.g. 2025-03-18T09:00:00+08:00 or 2025-03-18T01:00:00Z.
Exclusive end in RFC3339; must be after start. Examples: 2025-03-18T10:00:00+08:00, 2025-03-18T02:00:00Z.

hint.en_US: RFC3339 datetime with timezone offset, must be after start time. Examples: 2025-03-18T10:00:00+08:00, 2025-03-18T02:00:00Z

llm_description.en_US: All-day start date (yyyy-mm-dd). Examples: 2025-03-18, 2025-12-01.

hint.en_US: Start date for all-day events, format: yyyy-mm-dd. Example: 2025-03-18
hint.zh_Hans: 全天事件开始日期，格式：yyyy-mm-dd。示例：2025-03-18

llm_description.en_US: Exclusive end date (yyyy-mm-dd); for one-day event use the day after start_date. Examples: range Mar 18 only → end 2025-03-19.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 全天结束日期（不含）；单日事件填开始日的下一天。示例：仅 3/18 一天 → 结束 2025-03-19。

hint.en_US: End date (exclusive) for all-day events, must be after start date. For a single day, set to the next day. Example: one-day event on Mar 18 → end_date = 2025-03-19
hint.zh_Hans: 全天事件结束日期（不含），必须晚于开始日期。单日事件需设为开始日期的下一天。示例：3月18日一天的事件 → 结束日期 = 2025-03-19

llm_description.zh_Hans: IANA 时区名称（用于非全天事件的开始/结束）。示例："Asia/Shanghai"、"America/New_York"、"Europe/Berlin"、"Etc/UTC"。

Call calendarList.list (the "List Calendars" tool) to retrieve all available calendar IDs.

llm_description.en_US: Calendar identifier. Use the keyword "primary" to access the currently authenticated user's primary calendar. For other calendars, use the calendar ID which is typically an email address — either the owner's email (e.g. user@gmail.com) or the calendar-specific address (e.g. abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com). Call calendarList.list (the "List Calendars" tool) to retrieve all available calendar IDs.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 日历标识符。使用关键字 "primary" 访问当前登录用户的主日历。其他日历使用日历 ID，通常为邮箱地址格式——可以是所有者邮箱（如 user@gmail.com）或日历专属地址（如 abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com）。调用「列出日历」工具可获取所有可用的日历 ID。

hint.en_US: Use "primary" for your main calendar, or a calendar email address. Run "List Calendars" to find IDs.
hint.zh_Hans: 主日历使用 "primary"，或使用日历邮箱地址。可通过「列出日历」获取所有日历 ID。

llm_description.en_US: Opaque event identifier. Must be 5-1024 characters, using base32hex characters (lowercase a-v and digits 0-9).
llm_description.zh_Hans: 事件标识符。必须为 5-1024 个字符，使用 base32hex 字符（小写字母 a-v 和数字 0-9）。

hint.en_US: The unique identifier of the event
hint.zh_Hans: 事件的唯一标识符

hint.en_US: Limit results to a time window using time_min / time_max (RFC3339). Example pair: 2025-03-01T00:00:00Z … 2025-03-31T23:59:59Z. Ensure returned text fits your model context.
hint.zh_Hans: 开启后用 time_min / time_max（RFC3339）限定时间窗。示例：2025-03-01T00:00:00Z 至 2025-03-31T23:59:59Z。注意返回内容不要超过模型上下文上限。

llm_description.en_US: timeMin: lower bound (exclusive) for event end time (RFC3339). Examples: 2025-03-01T00:00:00Z, 2025-03-01T08:00:00+08:00.

hint.en_US: timeMin (optional): RFC3339 with timezone offset; lower bound (exclusive) for event end time. Examples: 2025-03-01T00:00:00Z, 2025-03-01T08:00:00+08:00.

llm_description.en_US: timeMax: upper bound (exclusive) for event start time (RFC3339). Must be > timeMin. Examples: 2025-03-31T23:59:59Z, 2025-04-01T00:00:00+08:00.

hint.en_US: timeMax (optional): RFC3339 with timezone offset; upper bound (exclusive) for event start time; must be after timeMin if both set. Examples: 2025-03-31T23:59:59Z, 2025-04-01T00:00:00+08:00.
hint.zh_Hans: timeMax（可选）：RFC3339 含时区偏移；事件开始时间的上限（不含）；须晚于 timeMin。示例：2025-03-31T23:59:59Z、2025-04-01T00:00:00+08:00。

llm_description.en_US: Maximum number of instances returned per page. Default 250, max 2500.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 每页返回的最大实例数。默认 250，最大 2500。

hint.en_US: maxResults: events per page, default 250, maximum 2500 (Google Calendar API).
hint.zh_Hans: maxResults：每页事件数，默认 250，最大 2500（Google Calendar API）。

llm_description.zh_Hans: 日历标识符。使用关键字 "primary" 访问当前登录用户的主日历。其他日历使用日历 ID，通常为邮箱地址格式——可以是所有者邮箱（如 user@gmail.com）或日历专属地址（如 abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com）。调用「列出日历」工具可获取所有可用的日历 ID。

hint.en_US: Use "primary" for your main calendar, or a calendar email address. Run "List Calendars" to find IDs.
hint.zh_Hans: 主日历使用 "primary"，或使用日历邮箱地址。可通过「列出日历」获取所有日历 ID。

llm_description.en_US: Opaque event identifier. Must be 5-1024 characters, using base32hex characters (lowercase a-v and digits 0-9).
llm_description.zh_Hans: 事件标识符。必须为 5-1024 个字符，使用 base32hex 字符（小写字母 a-v 和数字 0-9）。

hint.en_US: The unique identifier of the event
hint.zh_Hans: 事件的唯一标识符

llm_description.en_US: Target calendar identifier to move the event to. Use "primary" or a calendar email address.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 目标日历标识符。使用 "primary" 或日历邮箱地址。

hint.en_US: Target calendar for the event
hint.zh_Hans: 事件的目标日历

llm_description.en_US: Whether to send notifications. "all" = all guests, "externalOnly" = non-Google Calendar guests only, "none" = no notifications.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 是否发送通知。"all" = 所有参与者，"externalOnly" = 仅非 Google 日历参与者，"none" = 不通知。

hint.en_US: Whether to send notifications about the event change
hint.zh_Hans: 是否发送关于事件变更的通知

description.en_US: Create an event from simple natural language text
description.zh_Hans: 根据简单自然语言文本创建事件

llm_description.en_US: Calendar identifier. Use the keyword "primary" to access the currently authenticated user's primary calendar. For other calendars, use the calendar ID which is typically an email address — either the owner's email (e.g. user@gmail.com) or the calendar-specific address (e.g. abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com). Call calendarList.list (the "List Calendars" tool) to retrieve all available calendar IDs.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 日历标识符。使用关键字 "primary" 访问当前登录用户的主日历。其他日历使用日历 ID，通常为邮箱地址格式——可以是所有者邮箱（如 user@gmail.com）或日历专属地址（如 abcdef1234@group.calendar.google.com）。调用「列出日历」工具可获取所有可用的日历 ID。

hint.en_US: Use "primary" for your main calendar, or a calendar email address. Run "List Calendars" to find IDs.
hint.zh_Hans: 主日历使用 "primary"，或使用日历邮箱地址。可通过「列出日历」获取所有日历 ID。

llm_description.en_US: Natural language text describing the event. Google parses this to extract title, date, time, and location. Examples: 'Dinner with John tomorrow at 7pm', 'Meeting at Conference Room A on Friday 2pm-3pm'.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 描述事件的自然语言文本。Google 会解析其中的标题、日期、时间和地点。例如：'明天晚上7点和John吃饭'、'周五下午2点到3点在会议室A开会'。

hint.en_US: Natural language, e.g. 'Dinner with John tomorrow at 7pm'
hint.zh_Hans: 自然语言，例如「明天晚上7点和John吃饭」

llm_description.en_US: Whether to send notifications. "all" = all guests, "externalOnly" = non-Google Calendar guests only, "none" = no notifications.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 是否发送通知。"all" = 所有参与者，"externalOnly" = 仅非 Google 日历参与者，"none" = 不通知。

hint.en_US: Whether to send notifications about the event change
hint.zh_Hans: 是否发送关于事件变更的通知

description.en_US: Get a single user setting
description.zh_Hans: 获取单个用户设置

llm_description.en_US: The ID of the user setting. Common values: timezone, locale, weekStart, dateFieldOrder, showDeclinedEvents.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 用户设置的 ID。常见值：timezone、locale、weekStart、dateFieldOrder、showDeclinedEvents。

hint.en_US: e.g. timezone, locale, weekStart
hint.zh_Hans: 例如 timezone, locale, weekStart

description.en_US: List all user settings
description.zh_Hans: 列出所有用户设置

description.en_US: Get calendar and event color definitions
description.zh_Hans: 获取日历和事件的颜色定义

description.en_US: freeBusy.query (Calendar API v3): free/busy for calendars and/or groups
description.zh_Hans: freeBusy.query（Calendar API v3）：查询日历与/或群组的忙闲信息

llm_description.en_US: timeMin: start of the query interval (RFC3339 with offset). Examples: 2025-03-18T00:00:00Z, 2025-03-18T08:00:00+08:00.

hint.en_US: Start of time range (required). RFC3339 with timezone offset. Example: 2025-03-18T00:00:00Z or 2025-03-18T08:00:00+08:00

llm_description.en_US: timeMax: end of the query interval (RFC3339). Must be after timeMin. Examples: 2025-03-23T23:59:59Z, 2025-03-24T00:00:00+08:00.

hint.en_US: End of time range (required), must be after start. RFC3339 with timezone offset. Example: 2025-03-19T00:00:00Z or 2025-03-19T08:00:00+08:00

llm_description.en_US: items: comma-separated calendar or group ids (maps to request body items[].id). Use "primary" or email-style calendar ids.
llm_description.zh_Hans: items：逗号分隔的日历或群组标识（对应请求体 items[].id）。可使用 "primary" 或邮箱形式日历 ID。

hint.en_US: Comma-separated ids → request body items[].id (calendars and/or groups).
hint.zh_Hans: 逗号分隔的标识，对应请求体 items[].id（日历与/或群组）。

llm_description.en_US: timeZone: IANA id for the response. Optional; API default UTC. Examples: Asia/Shanghai, Europe/Berlin, Etc/UTC.
llm_description.zh_Hans: timeZone：响应使用的 IANA 时区。可选，API 默认 UTC。示例：Asia/Shanghai、Europe/Berlin、Etc/UTC。

hint.en_US: timeZone in request body (IANA). Optional; API default is UTC. Examples: Asia/Shanghai, Europe/Berlin, Etc/UTC.
hint.zh_Hans: 请求体 timeZone（IANA）。可选，API 默认为 UTC。示例：Asia/Shanghai、Europe/Berlin、Etc/UTC。

llm_description.en_US: groupExpansionMax: max calendar identifiers expanded for a single group (optional, max 100).
llm_description.zh_Hans: groupExpansionMax：单个群组最多展开的日历标识数量（可选，最大 100）。

hint.en_US: groupExpansionMax: max ids expanded per group (1–100, optional).
hint.zh_Hans: groupExpansionMax：单个群组最多展开的日历标识数（可选，1–100）。

llm_description.en_US: calendarExpansionMax: max calendars for which FreeBusy is returned (optional, max 50).
llm_description.zh_Hans: calendarExpansionMax：返回忙闲信息的日历数量上限（可选，最大 50）。

hint.en_US: calendarExpansionMax: max calendars in response (1–50, optional).
hint.zh_Hans: calendarExpansionMax：返回忙闲信息的日历数量上限（可选，1–50）。
